articles.title: PSU stock Coal India sets board meeting date to declare final dividend for FY26, record date. Details here
articles.excerpt: Coal India Ltd. will hold its 52nd AGM on 31 August 2026 via VC to approve a final dividend of ₹5.25 per share for FY26. The record date for dividend eligibility is set for 4 September 2026, with detailed TDS exemption g

articles.title: IndusInd Bank Q1 Results 2026: Net profit surges 72% at  ₹1,037 crore, NII up just 1%
articles.excerpt: IndusInd Bank reported a 72% rise in Q1 FY27 consolidated net profit to ₹1,037 crore, up from ₹604 crore last year. Net Interest Income grew 1% to ₹4,685 crore, while operating expenses fell 12.5% to ₹3,698 crore.
articles.summary: IndusInd Bank reported a 72% rise in Q1 FY27 consolidated net profit to ₹1,037 crore, up from ₹604 crore last year. Net Interest Income grew 1% to ₹4,685 crore, while operating expenses fell 12.5% to ₹3,698 crore.
